works.title: Dream Compendium No. 2
works.description: Antiphonal counterpoint for two saxophones and two harpsichords, built from tight hocketing and stereo call-and-response.

works.title: Heterophony with Birds
works.description: Slow canonic and heterophonic writing for plucked strings, accompanied by ambient field birds and opening late into bright high-register synth lines.

works.title: Boss Pattern (7+9)
works.description: High-energy synth sketch in 16/8 (7+9), driven by a continuous bass line and interlocking lead figures designed for combat pacing.

works.title: Arpeggio Scaffold
works.description: Voice-led theme over deliberate organ arpeggiation, outlining harmonic scaffolding intended for later orchestration and contrapuntal expansion.

works.title: Three-Voice Lament
works.description: Short three-voice plucked sketch centred on lament contour and clear contrapuntal spacing.

works.title: Dirge in Three
works.description: Slow processional polyphony with sparse drum pulse and layered voices forming the central texture.

works.title: Chant with Bells
works.description: Chant-like vocal texture with bell tones outlining the melodic skeleton and echoing below with resonant decay.

works.title: Guillaume de Machaut — Dame, ne regardes pas
works.description: Two-voice Ars Nova excerpt performed as layered, untexted vocals in a deep register with spacious resonance.

works.title: Nocturne Reed
works.description: Monophonic lead timbre inspired by the colour of French Romantic reed stops, shaped as a synth voice with rapid pitch transitions and expressive articulation.

works.title: VEDGALM
works.description: Growling bass timbre derived from heavy-engine motion, presented as a compact sound design study.

works.title: Adam de la Halle — Tant con je vivrai
works.description: Polyphonic excerpt sung in a low register with deliberate electronic processing applied as a stylistic layer.

works.title: Morales — Pie Jesu (from Missa pro defunctis)
works.description: Multitracked solo voices forming a compact Renaissance choral texture centred on blend and cadential weight.

works.title: Faenza Codex — Constantia
works.description: Two-part instrumental piece from the Faenza Codex performed on kantele, highlighting delicate clarity and line.

works.title: Schein — Sonata Padouana
works.description: Excerpt from Johann Hermann Schein’s Banchetto musicale, rendered vocally with subtle pulse to outline the slow dance form.

works.title: Shostakovich — Symphony No. 11 (excerpt)
works.description: Orchestral reconstruction of a climactic passage from Symphony No. 11 using modern sample libraries.

works.title: Philippus de Caserta — De ma dolour
works.description: Soft multitracked vocal rendering of an Ars Subtilior chanson, focused on blend and fragile contour.

works.title: Hasapiko — Polyphonic Harmonisation
works.description: Traditional Greek melody reharmonised in contrapuntal style, moving from source to extracted tune to a complete polyphonic realisation.

works.title: Preston — Uppon La Mi Re
works.description: Keyboard performance built on a repeating hexachord ground, with contrapuntal elaboration over a steady bass pattern.
